name: rna_seq_run
description: Run the complete RNA-Seq analysis pipeline.  Parameters can be specified via command line arguments or a configuration file.

params.name: --config, -c
params.description: Path to JSON/YAML config file. Overrides other options if provided.

params.name: --input, -i
params.description: Directory containing raw FastQ files. Required if --sra-ids is not provided.

params.name: --sra-id
params.description: SRA Accession IDs to download and process (e.g. SRR123456).

params.name: --output, -o
params.description: Directory for analysis results.

params.name: --design, -d
params.description: CSV file describing experimental design (columns: sample, condition, ...).

params.name: --species, -s
params.description: Species name for auto-downloading reference genome (e.g. 'Homo sapiens').

params.name: --assembly
params.description: Reference assembly accession, e.g. GCA_013347765.1. Takes precedence over --species for auto-download.

params.name: --genome-fasta
params.description: Path to reference genome FASTA file (overrides --species/--assembly auto-download).

params.name: --genome-gtf
params.description: Path to reference genome GTF annotation file (overrides --species/--assembly auto-download).

params.name: --threads, -t
params.description: Number of threads to use.

params.name: --skip-qc
params.description: Skip Quality Control step.

params.name: --skip-trim
params.description: Skip Trimming step.

params.name: --star-align
params.description: Enable STAR alignment and chromosome distribution analysis.

params.name: --theme
params.description: Plotting theme (default, nature, science, or custom package name).

params.name: --quant-tool
params.description: Quantification backend.

params.name: --quant-compare-tool
params.description: Comparison quantifiers, repeatable.

params.name: --step
params.description: Run only a specific step (qc, quant, de, enrichment, report). If None, run all.

params.name: --qualified-quality-phred
params.description: The quality value that a base is qualified. Default 15 means Phred quality >= Q15.

params.name: --unqualified-percent-limit
params.description: How many percents of bases are allowed to be unqualified (0~100). Default 40 means 40%.

params.name: --n-base-limit
params.description: How many N bases are allowed. Default 5.

params.name: --length-required
params.description: Reads shorter than length_required will be discarded. Default 15.

params.name: --max-len1
params.description: If read1 is longer than max_len1, trim it at tail. Default 0 (no trim).

params.name: --max-len2
params.description: If read2 is longer than max_len2, trim it at tail. Default 0 (no trim).

params.name: --adapter-sequence
params.description: Adapter sequence for read1. Auto-detected if not provided.

params.name: --adapter-sequence-r2
params.description: Adapter sequence for read2. Auto-detected if not provided.

params.name: --trim-front1
params.description: Trimming how many bases in front for read1.

params.name: --trim-tail1
params.description: Trimming how many bases in tail for read1.

params.name: --cut-right
params.description: Enable cut_right (sliding window trimming).

params.name: --cut-window-size
params.description: Window size for cut_right. Default 4.

params.name: --cut-mean-quality
params.description: Mean quality requirement for cut_right. Default 20.

params.name: --dedup
params.description: Enable deduplication.

params.name: --poly-g-min-len
params.description: Minimum length for polyG tail trimming. Default 10.
